subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Beauty of the Most Glorious! Beseech God that in this time of trial, when the winds of tests blow from all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بجمال ابهی از خدا بخواه که در این زمان امتحان که اریاح افتتان از جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
